---
title: "Contact"
---

## Get in Touch

If you'd like to collaborate on a project or just say hi, feel free to reach out through any of the platforms below!

### Professional Links
- **LinkedIn**: [Your LinkedIn Profile URL](https://www.linkedin.com/in/your-username)
- **GitHub**: [Your GitHub Profile URL](https://github.com/lizavagyok)

### Email
- **Email**: [your.email@example.com](mailto:your.email@example.com)

### Location
- Based in: Budapest, Hungary / Vienna, Austria (Central European University)
